_metadata.note: Machine-generated from USGS MCS Data Release CSV. Uranium and Germanium preserved from previous edition.

iron_ore.production_unit: thousand metric tons / million metric tons

alumina.label: Alumina Refinery Production
alumina.production_unit: thousand metric tons, calcined equivalent weight

ilmenite.label: Ilmenite
ilmenite.production_unit: thousand metric tons, titanium dioxide (TiO2) content
ilmenite.reserves_unit: thousand metric tons, titanium dioxide (TiO2) content

rutile.label: Rutile
rutile.production_unit: thousand metric tons, titanium dioxide (TiO2) content
rutile.reserves_unit: thousand metric tons, titanium dioxide (TiO2) content

compounds.label: Magnesium Compounds
compounds.production_unit: thousand metric tons, gross weight of magnesite (magnesium carbonate)
compounds.reserves_unit: thousand metric tons, gross weight of magnesite

metal.label: Magnesium Metal
metal.production_unit: thousand metric tons of magnesium metal
metal.reserves_unit: No separate reserves table; resources large to virtually unlimited

uranium.source: World Nuclear Association, 'World Uranium Mining Production', https://world-nuclear.org/information-library/nuclear-fuel-cycle/mining-of-uranium/world-uranium-mining-production (accessed 2025). NOTE: Uranium is not covered in USGS MCS 2025; WNA used per task instructions.
uranium.reserves_unit: tonnes U (Reasonably Assured Resources + Inferred Resources to $130/kg U, 2023 data from OECD NEA/IAEA Red Book as cited by WNA)

germanium.source: USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries 2025 (ver. 1.2, March 2025), https://doi.org/10.3133/mcs2025
germanium.reserves_unit: No country-level reserves reported by USGS (data not widely reported at mine/country level)

countries.production_y1: leading global producer; specific figure not published by USGS
secondary production; specific figure not published
known producer/recycler; specific figure not published
known producer/recycler; specific figure not published
known producer/recycler; specific figure not published
known producer/recycler; specific figure not published
not published in tabular form by USGS
